Container.Name: MapArr
Container.Overview:
MapArr analyzes your Docker Compose volume mounts and detects path mapping issues that break hardlinks, cause import failures, and create permission conflicts across your *arr stack (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, etc.).
Point it at your Docker stacks directory and get instant analysis with one-click fixes.
Container.Description: Path mapping intelligence for Docker *arr applications. Detects mount conflicts, hardlink breakage, permission issues, and generates fixes — all from your compose files.

Config.Name: Stacks Directory
Config.Description: Path to your Docker compose stacks on the host. Read-only for scanning; remove :ro for Apply Fix.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for full compose resolution. Optional — remove if using a socket proxy.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID to run as (Unraid default: 99)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run as (Unraid default: 100)

Config.Name: DOCKER_HOST
Config.Description: Socket proxy address (e.g., tcp://socket-proxy:2375). Leave blank if mounting the socket directly.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warning, error
